dribbbleContext:
I found 5 professional design references from Dribbble for this industry:
1. "Scappa - Finance Website animation b2b banking digital banking exchange finance financial financial service fintech investment landing page modern money payment saas startup transactions ui wealth website" — https://cdn.dribbble.com/userupload/17741137/file/still-138f8986548be60c1fe3daa58f7a7f8c.png
2. "Cirform - AI Finance Website ai ai fintech ai website banking banking platform crypto landing page cryptocurrency finance fintech fintech design fintech website fintech website design framer investment platform landing page product design saas trading webflow website" — https://cdn.dribbble.com/userupload/45421776/file/still-2149e17c3c9a2ae6969230cf615a81c8.png
3. "Finvo - finance website design interface product service startup ui ux web website" — https://cdn.dribbble.com/userupload/46465231/file/c2e77c35dbc72f5fcf0216460d43f9de.jpg
4. "Finance Website banking figma finance finance app finance website financial fintech investment landing page money ui uiux web design website" — https://cdn.dribbble.com/userupload/43575047/file/original-872b02cb09bb8a699163ca8210b90338.png
5. "Finance Website Design branding clean cool design finance website graphic design home page interface landing landing page minimal muhammad ali saas saas landing page ui ux web web page website" — https://cdn.dribbble.com/userupload/43516717/file/original-f151472d466b8a8e8ae9822678b6e5e9.jpg

Study these designs and match their quality level. Incorporate similar:
- Layout patterns and section flow
- Color palette sophistication
- Typography choices
- Whitespace and breathing room
- Visual hierarchy and emphasis
Do NOT copy them — create something original inspired by this quality level.

pages.name: Home
pages.title: John Hlongwani Associates | Strategic Financial Partners in Johannesburg

sections.description: High-impact hero section with a dark, modern interface aesthetic similar to the 'Scappa' reference.
sections.content_notes: Headline: 'Securing Your Legacy, Empowering Your Growth.' Subheadline: 'Johannesburg’s premier financial consultancy for high-net-worth individuals and forward-thinking enterprises.' CTA: 'Book a Consultation'.

sections.description: Strip of logos showing professional bodies (SAICA, IRBA) and generic corporate partners.
sections.content_notes: Desaturated logos to maintain visual hierarchy.

sections.description: Bento-grid style layout showcasing the 4 main service pillars.
sections.content_notes: Cards for Tax, Audit, Advisory, and Wealth. Hover effects with glassmorphism.

sections.description: Image on left, text on right. Brief introduction to the firm.
sections.content_notes: Focus on local expertise in the Sandton/JHB market combined with global financial standards.
Assets Managed, Years Experience, Corporate Clients.
Ready to optimize your financial position? Let's talk.

design_direction.mood: Sophisticated, Trustworthy, Modern Fintech-inspired but grounded in corporate professionalism.
design_direction.color_strategy: Primary: Deep Charcoal/Navy (#0F172A). Secondary: Slate Blue (#475569). Accent: Muted Metallic Gold (#C5A059) or Electric Teal (#2DD4BF) for digital touches. Use of dark mode aesthetic with subtle gradients.
design_direction.font_pairing: Headings: 'Manrope' or 'Outfit' (Modern, geometric sans-serif). Body: 'Inter' or 'Plus Jakarta Sans' (Clean, highly legible).
design_direction.layout_style: Bento-grid layouts for services, heavy use of glassmorphism on cards, generous whitespace, smooth scroll animations, and abstract 3D elements mixed with high-end photography.
